$comment: Canonical extension IDs for every supported browser. Installers read this file to generate per-browser native messaging host manifests. Update the IDs here after publishing to each store, then re-run the installer (or `byom-bridge --update-hosts`).

chromium.$comment: Shared by Chrome and Edge. Both use allowed_origins with the chrome-extension:// scheme.

firefox.$comment: Firefox uses allowed_extensions with the gecko add-on ID.
